name: renowide-cli-monorepo
description: Monorepo for Renowide developer tooling: @renowide/cli, @renowide/types, @renowide/ui-kit, @renowide/agent-sdk, the renowide-canvas + renowide-agent-sdk Python packages, and starter examples.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/types && npm run build --workspace=packages/ui-kit && npm run build --workspace=packages/agent-sdk && npm run build --workspace=packages/cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/types && npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/ui-kit && npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/agent-sdk && npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/cli
